title: Cylindrical valve with flow port apertures
abstract: A valve assembly for a high-pressure fluid pump includes a valve seat and a valve body. The valve body includes an annular head portion, a generally hollow valve cylinder coupled to the annular head portion, the valve cylinder defining an interior fluid passage within the valve cylinder, the annular head portion including a sealing surface projecting radially outward from the valve cylinder proximate to the annular head portion. The valve body further includes a plurality of flow port apertures circumferentially defined on the valve cylinder and disposed below the sealing surface, such that fluid passing through the interior fluid passage may exit through the plurality of flow port apertures.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A valve assembly for a high-pressure fluid pump, the valve comprising: a valve seat; and a valve body, the valve body comprising: an annular head portion; a generally hollow valve cylinder coupled to the annular head portion, the valve cylinder defining an interior fluid passage within the valve cylinder; the annular head portion including a sealing surface projecting radially outward from the valve cylinder proximate to the annular head portion; and a plurality of flow port apertures circumferentially defined on the valve cylinder and disposed below the sealing surface, such that fluid passing through the interior fluid passage may exit through the plurality of flow port apertures. 2. The valve of claim 1 , wherein the high-pressure fluid pump is a fracking pump. 3. The valve of claim 1, wherein the valve body further comprises at least one annular wiper seal disposed on the valve cylinder. 4. The valve of claim 3, wherein the wiper seal is disposed pm the valve cylinder below the plurality of flow port apertures. 5. The valve of claim 1, wherein the annular head portion comprises a seat for receiving a biasing member. 6. The valve of claim 1, wherein the plurality of flow port apertures have a shape selected from the group consisting of triangular, elliptical, diamond, and circular. 7. The valve of claim 1, wherein the valve body is constructed of a metal. 8. The valve of claim 7, wherein the valve body is constructed of a metal and an annular dampener element bonded thereto. 9. The valve of claim 1, wherein the valve body further comprises a tail that function to direct fluid flow within the interior fluid passage. 10. A valve for high-pressure applications, the valve comprising: a valve body, the valve body comprising: an annular head portion; a generally hollow valve cylinder coupled to the annular head portion, the valve cylinder defining an interior fluid passage within the valve cylinder; the annular head portion including a sealing surface projecting radially outward from the valve cylinder proximate to the annular head portion; and a plurality of flow port apertures circumferentially defined on the valve cylinder and disposed below the sealing surface, such that fluid passing through the interior fluid passage may exit through the plurality of flow port apertures. 11. The valve of claim 10, wherein the annular head portion comprises a seat for receiving a biasing member. 12. The valve of claim 10, wherein the plurality of flow port apertures have a shape selected from the group consisting of triangular, elliptical, diamond, and circular. 13. The valve of claim 10, wherein the valve body is constructed of a metal. 14. The valve of claim 10, wherein the valve body is constructed of a metal and an annular dampener element bonded thereto. 15. The valve of claim 10, wherein the valve body further comprises a tail that function to direct fluid flow within the interior fluid passage. 16. A fluid valve for high-pressure applications, the valve comprising: a metal valve body, the valve body comprising: an annular head portion defining an annular groove; an annular dampener element seated in the annular groove and bonded to the annular head portion; a generally hollow valve cylinder concentrically coupled to the annular head portion, the valve cylinder defining an interior fluid passage within the valve cylinder; the annular head portion including a sealing surface projecting radially upward and outward from the valve cylinder proximate to the annular head portion; and a plurality of flow port apertures circumferentially defined on the valve cylinder and disposed below the sealing surface, such that fluid passing through the interior fluid passage may exit through the plurality of flow port apertures. 17. The valve of claim 16, wherein the annular head portion comprises a seat for receiving a biasing member. 18. The valve of claim 16, wherein the plurality of flow port apertures have a shape selected from the group consisting of triangular, elliptical, diamond, and circular. 19. The valve of claim 16, wherein the valve body and valve cylinder are constructed of a metal. 20. The valve of claim 16, wherein the valve body further comprises a tail that function to direct fluid flow within the interior fluid passage.
